synthetic:4fe6c0467edb31027eebf2f8a41aa9.reason: The only use of math/rand/v2 is rand.Int64N on line 265 to add jitter to a retry backoff delay. The output is a time.Duration used solely to desynchronize parallel retry attempts, never for any security-sensitive purpose such as token/id/key generation. Using crypto/rand here would be strictly worse (can block on entropy), and an attacker's ability to predict the jitter yields no security impact.
